hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r .tool_input.file_path); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.astro) npx eslint --fix "$FILE" --quiet 2>/dev/null;; esac'
AI_AGENT=1 bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r .tool_input.file_path); case "$FILE" in *src/lib/*.ts) npx vitest related "$FILE" --run --project unit 2>/dev/null;; esac'
